user.title: Wallet Assistant
user.description: Set up Wallet Assistant for loyalty cards, vouchers, and promotions.

init.title: Wallet Assistant options
init.description: Configure price-watch search services and promotion platforms. Price-watch services use one service per line as Name|URL, with {query} where the filter text should be inserted. Promotion platforms use one platform per line as id|name|enabled|base address|username|password.

error.invalid_price_watch_services: Each enabled or disabled service line must use the documented service format and include the query placeholder.
error.invalid_promotion_platforms: Each promotion platform line must use the documented platform format. Enabled platforms must include a valid base address.
